subcodes.first_line: O thou revered one! Verily, I always remember thee, and forget thee not; I invoke God to ordain for thee good in this world and in the Kingdom
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
